assertions.reason: Account A completed registration, verification, and sign-in, but finishing onboarding with org name 'tenantorg-a-20260401 children' and the Children's Residential domain crashed on submit. The browser stayed on /onboarding, showed an application error, and owner assignment could not be confirmed through the real UI.
evidence: Browser errors after submit: column "ip_address" of relation "audit_logs" does not exist.

Shared dev-server log: POST /onboarding -> 500 with NeonDbError 'column "ip_address" of relation "audit_logs" does not exist' from createOrganisationWithInvites (src/features/organisations/actions.ts:301).

assertions.reason: The empty-name case showed inline validation, but the over-limit case did not. Attempting to enter a 111-character organisation name silently truncated the value and allowed the wizard to continue to step 2 instead of showing a maximum-length validation message.
evidence: Observed text after empty submit: 'Organisation name is required' and 'Slug is required'.
Observed over-limit behavior: attempted 111-character name starting with 'tenantorg-a-20260401-', field was truncated and the flow advanced to Step 2 with no max-length validation message.
Browser errors check for validation flow: none.

assertions.reason: The Children's Residential option was selectable in onboarding, but persistence into organisation settings and domain-specific terminology could not be validated because onboarding completion failed before any organisation settings/dashboard surface became reachable. Re-signing into account A returned the user to /onboarding instead of an organisation context.
evidence: Browser errors during selection flow: none; after submit: column "ip_address" of relation "audit_logs" does not exist.
Shared dev-server log: POST /onboarding -> 500, so the org-settings surface for the selected Children's Residential domain could not be reached.

assertions.reason: Account B successfully selected multiple care domains in the onboarding UI (Domiciliary Care and Supported Living), but the same onboarding completion failure prevented validation of persisted organisation settings or domain-specific features for both domains.
evidence: DOM/state check on selected step 2 controls: Domiciliary=true, Supported Living=true, Children's Residential=false.
Browser errors after submit: column "ip_address" of relation "audit_logs" does not exist.
Shared dev-server log: POST /onboarding -> 500 during the multi-domain completion attempt as well.

blockers.description: Organisation onboarding completion is broken by a database/schema mismatch: createOrganisationWithInvites writes audit log data including ip_address, but the audit_logs table in the running environment does not have that column.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried completion with two separate verified accounts (single-domain and multi-domain flows); each submission reproduced POST /onboarding -> 500 with the same NeonDbError.

notes: Account A covered VAL-TENANT-001, VAL-TENANT-002, and VAL-TENANT-003; account B covered VAL-TENANT-004.
Verification links for both accounts were recovered from the shared dev-server log, per the flow-validator guidance.
No browser errors were observed during step 1 validation or step 2 domain selection; the browser error appeared only on onboarding completion submit.
